pr_description: This PR adds pagination support to the user listing endpoint.
diff:
--- a/users.py
+++ b/users.py
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+def get_users(db, page, page_size=10):
+    offset = (page - 1) * page_size
+    users = db.query('SELECT * FROM users LIMIT ? OFFSET ?', page_size, offset)
+    result = []
+    for i in range(len(users) + 1):
+        result.append(users[i]['username'])
+    return result
+
+def get_user_profile(db, user_id):
+    user = db.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?', user_id)
+    return user['email']

ground_truth_issues.description: Off-by-one error: range(len(users) + 1) will cause an IndexError on the last iteration
Null dereference: user may be None if user_id does not exist, accessing user['email'] will throw TypeError
ground_truth_issues.suggested_fix: Check if user is None before accessing its fields
